//: SHA-pinned Shopify OS2 theme corpus for the Liquid checker regression gate. Each entry is frozen at an exact commit so the only thing that can move the baseline numbers is THIS checker's own code, never upstream theme drift. To extend: add a public Shopify OS2 theme, resolve its sha (`git ls-remote https://github.com/<owner>/<repo> HEAD`), append an entry, then re-bless with `pnpm shopify:matrix:baseline`.

themes.source: Shopify's first source-available OS2 reference theme. HEAD of main also tagged v15.5.0 — pinned to that release sha.
Shopify's Horizon reference theme (newer OS2 reference). Pinned to the main HEAD sha at the time this corpus was seeded.
